themes.title: Billing and Revenue Management
themes.description: Focus on implementing a robust billing engine and customer migration strategies.

themes.title: Customer Retention and Insights
themes.description: Enhance customer insights and retention strategies through data analysis and feedback mechanisms.

milestones.name: MVP - Billing Engine and Churn Monitoring
milestones.description: Develop and implement the usage-based billing engine and monitor projected churn.
milestones.success_criteria: Successfully implement the billing engine and monitor churn with a 95% accuracy rate.

milestones.name: V1 - Customer Migration Strategies
milestones.description: Implement strategies for grandfathering existing customers and develop a predictive cost dashboard.
milestones.success_criteria: Successfully grandfather 100% of existing customers and launch the predictive cost dashboard.

milestones.name: V2 - Pricing Sensitivity and Feedback Mechanisms
milestones.description: Conduct pricing sensitivity testing and implement user feedback mechanisms.
milestones.success_criteria: Complete pricing sensitivity testing with at least 80% customer participation and implement feedback mechanisms.

sequencing.reason: The V1 milestone depends on the successful implementation of the MVP features, particularly the billing engine.
The V2 milestone requires insights gained from the V1 customer migration strategies to inform pricing sensitivity testing.

mvp.goal: Establish a functional usage-based billing engine and monitor churn.

v1.goal: Implement customer migration strategies and enhance billing insights.

v2.goal: Refine pricing strategies and enhance customer feedback mechanisms.
